message:
refactor(storage): migrate locks to OrderedMutex and WBQ stats to global metrics

Replace all storage-layer Mutex statics (WBQ drain handle, commit queue,
repo cache, signal debounce) with OrderedMutex at their respective lock
levels. Remove the per-WBQ Arc<Mutex<WbqStats>> entirely -- enqueued,
drained, errors, and fallback counters now flow through lock-free
global_metrics().storage atomics. Change WbqStats fields from usize to
u64 for consistency with the atomic counter types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
